---
title: "Model perf compare plots"
author: "Michael Krochta"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
```

*global boxplots (maybe don't need)*
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Paths
perf_dir <- "C:/Users/mbkro/OneDrive/Documents/wetland-ml-models/results/model_performance"
fig_dir  <- "C:/Users/mbkro/OneDrive/Documents/wetland-ml-models/figures"

# Load
df_ml  <- readr::read_csv(file.path(perf_dir, "metrics_by_site.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
df_lme <- readr::read_csv(file.path(perf_dir, "lme_metrics_by_site.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Harmonize algorithm labels
df_ml  <- df_ml  %>% mutate(alg = toupper(alg))   # RFR / XGB
df_lme <- df_lme %>% mutate(alg = "LME")          # label as GLS for plots

# Combine on shared columns
common_cols <- intersect(names(df_ml), names(df_lme))
df_all <- bind_rows(df_ml[common_cols], df_lme[common_cols])

# Helper to plot/save one set
plot_save_set <- function(set_letter) {
  df_set <- df_all %>% filter(set == set_letter)

  p <- ggplot(df_set, aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, fill = alg)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, width = 0.6) +
    facet_wrap(~response, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(legend.position = "none") +
    labs(x = "Algorithm", y = "RMSE (°C)")  # no title

  # Filenames: full (A) vs partial (B)
  name <- ifelse(set_letter == "A", "full", "partial")
  outfile <- file.path(fig_dir, paste0("global_model_RMSE_boxplot_", name, ".png"))

  ggsave(outfile, plot = p, width = 10, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  message("Saved: ", outfile)
}

# Make both
plot_save_set("A")
plot_save_set("B")


```

*Global models and local models compare plot (use this one)*
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggh4x)

# --- Paths ---
perf_global_dir <- "C:/Users/mbkro/OneDrive/Documents/wetland-ml-models/results/model_performance"
perf_local_dir  <- "C:/Users/mbkro/OneDrive/Documents/wetland-ml-models/results/local_results"
fig_dir         <- "C:/Users/mbkro/OneDrive/Documents/wetland-ml-models/figures"

# ---------- GLOBAL (overall) ----------
g_ml  <- readr::read_csv(file.path(perf_global_dir, "metrics_overall.csv"),      show_col_types = FALSE)
g_gls <- readr::read_csv(file.path(perf_global_dir, "lme_metrics_overall.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

glob_all <- bind_rows(
  g_ml  %>% transmute(response, set, alg = toupper(alg), RMSE),
  g_gls %>% transmute(response, set, alg = "GLS",        RMSE)
) %>%
  mutate(
    response = dplyr::case_when(
      response == "max"   ~ "Max WT",
      response == "mean"  ~ "Mean WT",
      response == "range" ~ "Range WT",
      TRUE ~ as.character(response)
    ),
    alg = dplyr::case_when(
      tolower(alg) %in% c("gls","lme") ~ "GLS",
      tolower(alg) == "rfr"            ~ "RFR",
      tolower(alg) == "xgb"            ~ "XGB",
      TRUE ~ toupper(alg)
    ),
    alg = factor(alg, levels = c("GLS","RFR","XGB")),
    set = toupper(set)
  )

# ---------- LOCAL (by site, Set A/B) ----------
loc_ml  <- readr::read_csv(file.path(perf_local_dir, "local_models_final.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
loc_gls <- readr::read_csv(file.path(perf_local_dir, "gls_metrics_local.csv"),  show_col_types = FALSE)

loc_all <- bind_rows(
  loc_ml  %>% transmute(Site, response = Metric, set = Set, alg = toupper(Model), RMSE),
  loc_gls %>% transmute(Site, response = Metric, set = Set, alg = "GLS",         RMSE)
) %>%
  mutate(
    response = dplyr::case_when(
      response == "max"   ~ "Max WT",
      response == "mean"  ~ "Mean WT",
      response == "range" ~ "Range WT",
      TRUE ~ as.character(response)
    ),
    alg = factor(alg, levels = c("GLS","RFR","XGB")),
    set = toupper(set)
  )

# ----- Shared y-limits (per response) across Set A & B -----
alg_levels <- c("GLS","RFR","XGB")

ylims_by_resp <- bind_rows(
  glob_all %>% dplyr::select(response, RMSE),
  loc_all  %>% dplyr::select(response, RMSE)
) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(response = as.character(response)) %>%  # <- key change
  dplyr::summarise(
    ymin = 0,
    ymax = max(RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(ymax = max(pretty(c(0, ymax))))

grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  response = unique(ylims_by_resp$response),
  alg = factor(alg_levels, levels = alg_levels)
)

ylims_df <- dplyr::left_join(grid, ylims_by_resp, by = "response") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(c(ymin, ymax), names_to = "which", values_to = "RMSE")



# ---------- Plot function (one set at a time) ----------
plot_local_vs_global <- function(set_letter = "A") {
  dd_local <- loc_all %>% filter(set == set_letter)
  dd_glob  <- glob_all %>% filter(set == set_letter)

  # manual site palette for stability (optional)
  site_pal <- c(
    Anvil   = "#E67E80", Butte   = "#8AADF4", Cooper = "#A6D189",
    Crater  = "#C6A0F6", Hideaway= "#7DC4E4", Pint   = "#E5C890", Sam = "#F4B8E4"
  )
  # keep only sites present
  site_levels <- sort(unique(dd_local$Site))
  site_pal <- site_pal[names(site_pal) %in% site_levels]

p <- ggplot() +
  # enforce shared per-response y ranges across Set A & Set B
  geom_blank(data = ylims_df, aes(x = alg, y = RMSE)) +
  # Local, by site
  geom_line(
    data = dd_local,
    aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, group = Site, color = Site),
    linewidth = 0.9, alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = dd_local,
    aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, color = Site),
    size = 2.4, alpha = 1
  ) +
  # Global reference
  geom_line(
    data = dd_glob,
    aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, group = response, linetype = "Global (overall)"),
    color = "black", linewidth = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = dd_glob,
    aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, shape = "Global (overall)"),
    color = "black", fill = "white", stroke = 1.1, size = 2.8
  ) +
 facet_grid2(~ response, scales = "free_y", axes = "margins") +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_pal, name = "Site") +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Global (overall)" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Global (overall)" = 21)) +
  guides(
    linetype = "none",
    shape = guide_legend(
      title = NULL,
      override.aes = list(linetype = "dashed", color = "black", fill = "white", size = 3)
    ),
    color = guide_legend(title = "Site")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Algorithm", y = "RMSE (°C)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  legend.position  = "bottom",
  legend.box       = "vertical",
  strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
  axis.title.y     = element_text(),
  strip.background = element_blank()
)
  outfile <- file.path(
    fig_dir,
    paste0("local_vs_global_RMSE_Set", set_letter, ".png")
  )
  ggsave(outfile, p, width = 11, height = 6.8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  message("Saved: ", outfile)
  p
}

# Make both figures
plot_local_vs_global("A")
plot_local_vs_global("B")


```
```{r}
# Ensure Set is a nice factor for row strips
glob_all <- glob_all %>%
  mutate(set = factor(set, levels = c("A","B"), labels = c("Full","Partial")))
loc_all  <- loc_all  %>%
  mutate(set = factor(set, levels = c("A","B"), labels = c("Full","Partial")))

# Rebuild y-limits df with Full/Partial (prevents NA facet rows)
ylims_df <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  response = unique(ylims_by_resp$response),
  alg      = factor(alg_levels, levels = alg_levels),
  set      = c("Full","Partial")
) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(ylims_by_resp, by = "response") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(c(ymin, ymax), names_to = "which", values_to = "RMSE")

# Site palette (all 7)
site_pal <- c(
  Anvil = "#E67E80", Butte = "#8AADF4", Cooper = "#A6D189",
  Crater = "#C6A0F6", Hideaway = "#7DC4E4", Pint = "#E5C890", Sam = "#F4B8E4"
)

# Combined plot (two rows = Full/Partial; three columns = responses)
p_combined <- ggplot() +
  # pin shared per-response baseline/max
  geom_blank(data = ylims_df, aes(x = alg, y = RMSE)) +

  # local results
  geom_line(
    data = loc_all,
    aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, group = interaction(Site, set), color = Site),
    linewidth = 0.9, alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = loc_all,
    aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, color = Site),
    size = 2.4
  ) +

  # global references
  geom_line(
    data = glob_all,
    aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, group = response, linetype = "Global (overall)"),
    color = "black", linewidth = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = glob_all,
    aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, shape = "Global (overall)"),
    color = "black", fill = "white", stroke = 1.1, size = 2.8
  ) +

  # facets: rows = Full/Partial, cols = responses; axes only on outer margins
  ggh4x::facet_grid2(set ~ response, scales = "free_y", axes = "margins") +

  # HARD CAP Full row to [0, 2]; leave Partial free
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales(
    y = list(
      set == "Full"     ~ scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2)),
      set == "Partial"  ~ scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.04)))
    )
  ) +

  # legend & styling
  scale_color_manual(values = site_pal, name = "Site", drop = FALSE) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Global (overall)" = "dashed"), guide = "legend") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Global (overall)" = 21), guide = "legend") +
  guides(
    linetype = guide_legend(title = NULL, override.aes = list(color = "black")),
    shape    = guide_legend(title = NULL, override.aes = list(color = "black", fill = "white", size = 3)),
    color    = guide_legend(title = "Site")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Algorithm", y = "RMSE (°C)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.box       = "vertical",
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# Save
outfile <- file.path(fig_dir, "local_vs_global_RMSE_Combined_Full_Partial.png")
ggsave(outfile, p_combined, width = 11, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
message("Saved: ", outfile)

```


*Plotting GLOBAL site-level metrics with global models (probably for interpretation only)*
```{r}
# --- Paths ---
perf_global_dir <- "C:/Users/mbkro/OneDrive/Documents/wetland-ml-models/results/model_performance"
perf_local_dir  <- "C:/Users/mbkro/OneDrive/Documents/wetland-ml-models/results/model_performance"
fig_dir         <- "C:/Users/mbkro/OneDrive/Documents/wetland-ml-models/figures"

# ---------- GLOBAL (overall) ----------
g_ml  <- readr::read_csv(file.path(perf_global_dir, "metrics_overall.csv"),      show_col_types = FALSE)
g_gls <- readr::read_csv(file.path(perf_global_dir, "lme_metrics_overall.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

glob_all <- bind_rows(
  g_ml  %>% transmute(response, set, alg = toupper(alg), RMSE),
  g_gls %>% transmute(response, set, alg = "LME",        RMSE)
) %>%
  mutate(
    response = dplyr::case_when(
      response == "max"   ~ "Max WT",
      response == "mean"  ~ "Mean WT",
      response == "range" ~ "Range WT",
      TRUE ~ as.character(response)
    ),
    alg = dplyr::case_when(
      tolower(alg) %in% c("gls","lme") ~ "LME",
      tolower(alg) == "rfr"            ~ "RFR",
      tolower(alg) == "xgb"            ~ "XGB",
      TRUE ~ toupper(alg)
    ),
    alg = factor(alg, levels = c("LME","RFR","XGB")),
    set = toupper(set)
  )

# ---------- GLOBAL LOCAL (by site, Set A/B) ----------
loc_ml  <- readr::read_csv(file.path(perf_local_dir, "metrics_by_site.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
loc_gls <- readr::read_csv(file.path(perf_local_dir, "lme_metrics_by_site.csv"),  show_col_types = FALSE)

loc_all <- bind_rows(
  loc_ml  %>% transmute(Site, response = response, set = set, alg = toupper(alg), RMSE),
  loc_gls %>% transmute(Site, response = response, set = set, alg = "LME",         RMSE)
) %>%
  mutate(
    response = dplyr::case_when(
      response == "max"   ~ "Max WT",
      response == "mean"  ~ "Mean WT",
      response == "range" ~ "Range WT",
      TRUE ~ as.character(response)
    ),
    alg = factor(alg, levels = c("LME","RFR","XGB")),
    set = toupper(set)
  )

# ---------- Plot function (one set at a time) ----------
plot_local_vs_global <- function(set_letter = "A") {
  dd_local <- loc_all %>% filter(set == set_letter)
  dd_glob  <- glob_all %>% filter(set == set_letter)

  # manual site palette for stability (optional)
  site_pal <- c(
    Anvil   = "#E67E80", Butte   = "#8AADF4", Cooper = "#A6D189",
    Crater  = "#C6A0F6", Hideaway= "#7DC4E4", Pint   = "#E5C890", Sam = "#F4B8E4"
  )
  # keep only sites present
  site_levels <- sort(unique(dd_local$Site))
  site_pal <- site_pal[names(site_pal) %in% site_levels]

  p <- ggplot() +
    # Local, by site (colored lines + solid points)
    geom_line(
      data = dd_local,
      aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, group = Site, color = Site),
      linewidth = 0.9, alpha = 0.95
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = dd_local,
      aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, color = Site),
      size = 2.4, alpha = 1, 
    ) +
    # Global overall (black dashed line + hollow point, with its own legend key)
    # Option A: group by response (since you facet by response)
geom_line(
  data = dd_glob,
  aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, group = response, linetype = "Global (overall)"),
  color = "black", linewidth = 0.9
) +

     
    geom_point(
      data = dd_glob,
      aes(x = alg, y = RMSE, shape = "Global (overall)"),
      color = "black", fill = "white", stroke = 1.1, size = 2.8
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ response, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_color_manual(values = site_pal, name = "Site") +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Global (overall)" = "dashed")) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Global (overall)" = 21)) +
    guides(
      # We only want ONE small legend key for the global reference:
      linetype = "none",
      shape = guide_legend(
        title = NULL,
        override.aes = list(linetype = "dashed", color = "black", fill = "white", size = 3)
      ),
      color = guide_legend(title = "Site")
    ) +
    labs(x = "Algorithm", y = "RMSE (°C)") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position  = "bottom",
      legend.box       = "vertical",
      strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold")
    )

  outfile <- file.path(
    fig_dir,
    paste0("GLOBAL_RMSE_Set", set_letter, ".png")
  )
  ggsave(outfile, p, width = 11, height = 6.8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  message("Saved: ", outfile)
  p
}

# Make both figures
plot_local_vs_global("A")
plot_local_vs_global("B")
```
